markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on next steps for strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Sessions hit an all-time high, but Scrunch rankings are stalled. The "observability" cluster's avg. position improved from 17 to 13.95, but traffic remains low.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** The focus is moving from competitor pages to "evaluation engineering" content, using "evals" as a key term to capture rising search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Q1 Priorities:** Content will support the "Agent Protect" launch and "Galileo Academy" course, with a new "Galileo Studios" video initiative starting mid-Dec/Jan.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**New Ideas:** A low-lift "evals" tool will be pitched to drive sign-ups, and a blog aggregating industry case studies (not Galileo's) will be explored.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [**Overall:** Sessions hit an all-time high in the last two weeks, pacing ahead of October.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Top Performers:** Pillar pages and a blog on "specification first AI development" are driving traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
      - [**Insight:** This blog is outperforming TDD-related content and SEMrush data, suggesting Galileo is ahead of the curve on an emerging topic.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Cluster Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Observability:** Avg. position improved from 17 → 13.95, but traffic remains low.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
      - [**Other Clusters:** All lost some traffic week-over-week.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**Competitive Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Arise:** Lost keywords (873 → 844).](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Galileo:** Stable at \~315–323 keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Scrunch:** Position stalled at 46.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
          - [**Hypothesis:** Competitors (Brain Trust, Arise) have a larger, more varied content footprint.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
          - [**Action:** Continue experimentation to find a breakthrough.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Content Strategy & Q1 Priorities

  - [**Evaluation Engineering Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Focus:** Shift from competitor pages to "evaluation engineering" content.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Keywords:** Target "eval engineering," "agent eval engineering," and "evaluation engineering."](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Format:** Write comprehensive articles with FAQs at the end to avoid Google's "thin content" penalty.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
      - [**Initial Articles:** "How to become an evaluation engineer" and "What is evaluation engineering."](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [**"Evals" Keyword Refresh:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Rationale:** "AI evals" has higher search volume than "AI evaluations" and is the colloquial term.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [**Action:** Conduct a master refresh of all "evaluation" blogs, replacing the term with "evals" to capture this traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategic Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [**Product Launch:** "Agent Protect" (agent-specific guardrails).](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
      - [**Education:** "Galileo Academy" course on evaluations to define the "evaluation engineering" category.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
      - [**Video:** "Galileo Studios" (2–3 technical videos/week) to launch mid-Dec/Jan, pending hiring.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Sponsorship:** Galileo will sponsor Connor's "Chain of Thought" brand in 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [**PPC & Content Synergy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**E-book:** "Context Engineering" is performing well on LinkedIn and sponsorships.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [**Search Ads:** A new agency will run broad-match ads for "AI observability platforms."](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Explore more "context engineering" content angles.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### New Content Ideas

  - [**Free Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Most proposed tools are not feasible due to product bandwidth constraints and current free-tier onboarding issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** A low-lift "evals" tool is feasible and could serve as a high-converting landing page to drive sign-ups. Jackson will pitch this internally.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**Industry Case Study Blog:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - [**Concept:** A single blog post aggregating public case studies from other companies (e.g., GitLab), not Galileo's own.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This format has proven successful for a competitor in driving traffic and citations. Vivek will research its viability.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
      - [Prioritize new "evaluation engineering" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Schedule the "evals" keyword refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Move 8 competitor blogs to "Drafting" for rewrite with new assets.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
      - [Research the industry case study blog concept.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [**Jackson:**](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
      - [Pitch the low-lift "evals" tool internally.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [Add Q1 strategic priorities to the content Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
      - [Mark the "Arise" competitor blog "Ready to Publish."](https://fathom.video/share/Hb48ZjVjU3obJcYK4vgcR82f-dxfoBHy?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
